_schema_notes.coverage: Authoritative schema for all DID formats — DD Form 1664 (pre-2014) and free-text (post-2014 MIL-STD-963C)
_schema_notes.did_format: Set to 'dd_form_1664' or 'free_text'. Determines which fields are expected to be populated.
_schema_notes.963c_compliant: True if the DID was prepared under MIL-STD-963C (2014 or later). False for older DIDs.
_schema_notes.reserved_fields: Fields marked RESERVED are present in one format but not the other. Always include them — set to empty string or empty array when not applicable.
_schema_notes.preparation_instructions: Official MIL-STD-963C name for what was previously called 'requirements'. Contains the numbered sections of the DID. All section numbers are normalized to strictly numeric dot-notation (1, 1.1, 1.1.1). Letter-based source numbering (2.a, 3.1.b) is converted to numeric equivalents (2.1, 3.1.2).
_schema_notes.asterisk: True if the requirement number is followed by * in the source document (conditional requirement)

title: Subsystem Design Analysis Report
summary: This report evaluates the design approach for configuration items or subsystems, providing government visibility during system acquisition analysis and other developmental efforts.
use_relationship: This report is used to evaluate the design approach for the configuration item or subsystem and to provide visibility to the government. The data may also be used to formulate additional technical direction to the design activity. This report is normally prepared during the analysis effort for each configuration item or subsystem during system acquisition. It may also be applicable to other developmental efforts. This is a REV B to previous DID Area GDRQ which has been replaced by SESS. This DID supersedes DI-GDRQ-80567A.

references.label: Copies of ANSI/NISO Z39.18 are available online at

distribution_statement: DISTRIBUTION STATEMENT A: Approved for public release; distribution is unlimited.

preparation_instructions.title: Reference documents.
preparation_instructions.content: The applicable issue of the documents cited herein, including their approval dates and dates of any applicable amendments, notices, and revisions shall be as specified in the solicitation or contract.

preparation_instructions.title: Format.
preparation_instructions.content: This DID contains the format and content preparation instructions for the data product generated by the specific and discrete task requirement as delineated in the contract.

children.title: The report shall be structured to cover each of the major subsections of the design analysis task separately.
children.content: The analysis report shall correlate the design requirements with the system requirement and any specified requirement for the subsystem or configuration item. The report shall describe or reference all related data (sketches, preliminary drawings, schematics, functional diagrams) necessary for portrayal of the analysis or to aid in an understanding of the analysis.

children.title: The report shall conform to the specific requirements of ANSI/NISO Z39.18 as stated in the Contract Data Requirements List (CDRL) (DD Form 1423).

preparation_instructions.title: Content.
preparation_instructions.content: The report shall include the following:

children.title: Description of the items involved, including adequate drawings, schematics, and computer print-outs, to support the analysis;
Specification of design constraints and assumptions imposed on the analysis;
Discussion of the evaluation and analysis procedure, method, or technique used, and its probable accuracy, explained by sample calculations;
Identification of source material used in the analysis;
Results of the analysis, to include the following:
Design impact and any constraints which influence other subsystems or configuration items;
Problems encountered or revealed, and suggested solutions.
